home.title: Mark-Lee | Open Source Markdown Editor
home.meta_description: A free and open source desktop Markdown editor focused on writing speed and clean publishing.
home.hero_lead: Mark-Lee is a free and open source Markdown editor for people who write every day and need speed, clarity, and clean exports.
home.features_title: How to use it in 3 steps
home.features_lead: Install, write, and publish without friction.
home.feature_1_text: Use file actions, tab mode, and sidebar navigation to work in your workspace.
home.feature_2_text: Advanced find/replace, snippets, and interface modes for daily writing.
home.feature_3_text: Export to Markdown, HTML, or PDF through one unified publishing flow.
home.downloads_lead: The links below auto-sync with the latest available release.
home.contrib_lead: Contributions are welcome: issues, discussions, PRs, and UX feedback.
home.projects_lead: Two recent projects are highlighted automatically (excluding Mark-Lee).
faq.title: Common Issues - Mark-Lee
